A veteran of the junior circuit, Taneesh has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Taneesh has competed across 5 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 7 titles to show for it, Taneesh is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
